zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott於1484年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯特費爾德時，他的父親Sir Ralph Heathcote19歲，母親Ellen Thompson19歲。他於1525年與Mary Catherine Cromyn在英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯特費爾德結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1559年在他的家鄉享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott于1484年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾斯特費爾德时，他的父亲Sir Ralph Heathcote19岁，母亲Ellen Thompson19岁。他于1525年与Mary Catherine Cromyn在英国英格兰德比夏爾斯特費爾德结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1559年在他的家乡享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Heathcott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Derbyshire and Lancashire): variant of   Heathcote  .

variants.name: Heathcote
meanings: English: habitational name from Heathcote in Hartington (Derbyshire), Heathcote in Warwick (Warwickshire), or Heathcote Farm in Wasperton (Warwickshire). The placenames derive from Old English hǣth ‘heath, heather’ + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’. In Yorkshire, this name is pronounced Hethkett.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Jenkyns
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Jenkins
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from the medieval given name Jankin. This was a pet form of the boy's name Jan , with the diminutive suffix -kin. The modern given name is popular in Wales, where the surnames Jenkin and Jenkins are common.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott was born in 1484, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ralph Heathcote, was 19 and his mother, Ellen Thompson, was 19. He married Mary Catherine Cromyn in 1525, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1559, in his hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott est né en 1484, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph Heathcote, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Ellen Thompson, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Mary Catherine Cromyn en 1525, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1559, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott 1484 in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph Heathcote 19 und seine Mutter Ellen Thompson 19. Er hat 1525 in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Mary Catherine Cromyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1559 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott è nato il nel 1484 nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Ralph Heathcote, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Thompson, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Mary Catherine Cromyn nel 1525, nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1559, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcottが1484年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Heathcoteは19歳，母Ellen Thompsonは19歳であった。1525年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドでMary Catherine Cromynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1559年に故郷で75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott(이)가 1484년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 체스터필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Heathcote(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Thompson(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 체스터필드에서 Mary Catherine Cromyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1559년 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott nasceu em 1484, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ralph Heathcote, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Thompson, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Catherine Cromyn em 1525, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1559, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott родился в 1484 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Heathcote было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Thompson, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Catherine Cromyn в 1525 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1559 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Jenkyns Heathcott nació en 1484, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Ralph Heathcote, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Ellen Thompson, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Mary Catherine Cromyn en 1525, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1559, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años.
